purpose: Records the point where deterministic card row enrichment writes are closed and remaining work is governance, source-adjudication, or deferred image work.

latest_completed_packages.scope: 13 child card_printing inserts across 10 source-mapped childless parents

external_mapping_boundary.decision: Do not convert external_ids payloads into active external_mappings without source-specific proof.

guardrails: Do not insert external mappings from payloads without source-specific proof.
Do not treat Master Index provenance payloads as active source mappings.
Do not delete no-child parents without dependency-transfer or duplicate-resolution proof.
Do not infer species, traits, or metadata from weak sibling/source assumptions.
Do not label representative images as exact.
Do not create migrations unless explicitly entering the alias sidecar schema lane.
resume_guidance: Website/app consumption can proceed against stable identity and printing truth.
External mapping alias sidecar requires a separate schema decision.
No-child parent work should continue as governance planning, not blind writes.
Image Truth remains a separate deferred lane.
